headline: Cipher Digital Shifts From Bitcoin Mining To AI Infrastructure With Tech Giants
summary: Cipher Digital (NasdaqGS:CIFR) is shifting from Bitcoin mining to AI infrastructure services. The company has entered into multi billion dollar, long term leasing agreements with Amazon Web Services and Google. These contracts position Cipher Digital as a high performance computing data center provider to two major cloud platforms. Cipher Digital has historically operated in Bitcoin mining, a business tied closely to crypto price cycles and mining difficulty. By committing capacity to...
